name: Vibe Hotel Sydney
description: A boutique-feel Vibe Hotel in inner-city Sydney, walking distance to Hyde Park, Central Station and Oxford Street nightlife. Compact rooms with floor-to-ceiling windows, a rooftop pool with city skyline views, and a 24-hour gym on the ground floor.

name: Adina Apartment Hotel Bondi Beach
description: Self-contained one- and two-bedroom apartments steps from Bondi Beach. Full kitchens and laundry — built for longer stays and families. Heated outdoor pool, sauna, and a gym; the beach is a 4-minute walk.

name: Vibe Hotel Melbourne
description: Right in the Melbourne CBD on Flinders Lane, surrounded by laneway coffee and street art. Modern rooms, a ground-floor restaurant, and a small but well-equipped 24-hour gym.

name: Travelodge Hotel Auckland Wynyard Quarter
description: Modern Travelodge on Auckland's waterfront in the Wynyard Quarter. Easy walk to the harbour, Viaduct restaurants and Spark Arena. Includes free breakfast and family-friendly room configurations.

name: Adina Apartment Hotel Surry Hills
description: One- and two-bedroom apartments in Surry Hills with full kitchens, laundry, a 25m heated pool and a gym. A 10-minute walk to Central Station and easy access to the Crown Street eat-street.
